## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content priorities and project scope for the upcoming AI product focus.](https://fathom.video/share/qwrJx6xiz-EfXuBjxy8bDu7tb7uSjD8A?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Focus Shift:** Pause use case pages for the old data integration product to prioritize new use case pages for the AI product.](https://fathom.video/share/qwrJx6xiz-EfXuBjxy8bDu7tb7uSjD8A?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [**Legacy Work Continues:** Complete remaining industry pages (34 left) and add TLDRs to \~600 data engineering resource (DR) pages at a rate of \~50/week.](https://fathom.video/share/qwrJx6xiz-EfXuBjxy8bDu7tb7uSjD8A?tab=summary&timestamp=178.0)
  - [**TLDR vs. AI Summary:** Continue adding TLDRs while Airbyte analyzes performance data from a 25-page A/B test to decide on a single, optimal summary format.](https://fathom.video/share/qwrJx6xiz-EfXuBjxy8bDu7tb7uSjD8A?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - [**Future Scope:** After legacy work is done, GrowthX will shift to an 80-90% AI product focus; the need to cover \~480 competitor gap articles will be re-evaluated.](https://fathom.video/share/qwrJx6xiz-EfXuBjxy8bDu7tb7uSjD8A?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Shift: AI Product Focus

  - [**Decision:** Pause use case pages for the old data integration product.](https://fathom.video/share/qwrJx6xiz-EfXuBjxy8bDu7tb7uSjD8A?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Focus all new use case content on the AI product.](https://fathom.video/share/qwrJx6xiz-EfXuBjxy8bDu7tb7uSjD8A?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [**Timeline:** GrowthX will shift to an 80-90% AI product focus after completing current legacy tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/qwrJx6xiz-EfXuBjxy8bDu7tb7uSjD8A?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)

### Legacy Content Completion

  - [**Industry Pages:**](https://fathom.video/share/qwrJx6xiz-EfXuBjxy8bDu7tb7uSjD8A?tab=summary&timestamp=178.0)
      - [**Status:** 32 published this week; 34 remain.](https://fathom.video/share/qwrJx6xiz-EfXuBjxy8bDu7tb7uSjD8A?tab=summary&timestamp=178.0)
      - [**Goal:** Complete all remaining pages next week.](https://fathom.video/share/qwrJx6xiz-EfXuBjxy8bDu7tb7uSjD8A?tab=summary&timestamp=178.0)
  - [**Data Engineering Resource (DR) Pages:**](https://fathom.video/share/qwrJx6xiz-EfXuBjxy8bDu7tb7uSjD8A?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
      - [**Task:** Add TLDRs to \~600 pages.](https://fathom.video/share/qwrJx6xiz-EfXuBjxy8bDu7tb7uSjD8A?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
      - [**Pace:** \~50 pages per week.](https://fathom.video/share/qwrJx6xiz-EfXuBjxy8bDu7tb7uSjD8A?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
      - [**Status:** In progress.](https://fathom.video/share/qwrJx6xiz-EfXuBjxy8bDu7tb7uSjD8A?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [**Competitor Gap Articles:**](https://fathom.video/share/qwrJx6xiz-EfXuBjxy8bDu7tb7uSjD8A?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
      - [**Context:** A list of \~480 topics from a competitor gap analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/qwrJx6xiz-EfXuBjxy8bDu7tb7uSjD8A?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
      - [**Status:** Erik to confirm with Kari which articles are active.](https://fathom.video/share/qwrJx6xiz-EfXuBjxy8bDu7tb7uSjD8A?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
      - [**Decision:** Airbyte will re-evaluate the need for GrowthX to cover these topics after the legacy work is done.](https://fathom.video/share/qwrJx6xiz-EfXuBjxy8bDu7tb7uSjD8A?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)

### TLDR vs. AI Summary Test

  - [**Conflict:** A potential overlap exists between TLDRs (GrowthX) and AI summaries (Airbyte) on DR pages.](https://fathom.video/share/qwrJx6xiz-EfXuBjxy8bDu7tb7uSjD8A?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - [**Status:** A 25-page A/B test is underway to compare performance.](https://fathom.video/share/qwrJx6xiz-EfXuBjxy8bDu7tb7uSjD8A?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - [**Decision:** Continue adding TLDRs as planned.](https://fathom.video/share/qwrJx6xiz-EfXuBjxy8bDu7tb7uSjD8A?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Airbyte will analyze test data to select a single, optimal summary format for all DR pages.](https://fathom.video/share/qwrJx6xiz-EfXuBjxy8bDu7tb7uSjD8A?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/qwrJx6xiz-EfXuBjxy8bDu7tb7uSjD8A?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
      - [Pause use case pages for the old data integration product.](https://fathom.video/share/qwrJx6xiz-EfXuBjxy8bDu7tb7uSjD8A?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
      - [Confirm with Kari the status of the \~480 competitor gap articles.](https://fathom.video/share/qwrJx6xiz-EfXuBjxy8bDu7tb7uSjD8A?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
      - [Instruct Joe to continue adding TLDRs to DR pages.](https://fathom.video/share/qwrJx6xiz-EfXuBjxy8bDu7tb7uSjD8A?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [**Airbyte:**](https://fathom.video/share/qwrJx6xiz-EfXuBjxy8bDu7tb7uSjD8A?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
      - [Analyze TLDR vs. AI summary performance data to decide on a single format.](https://fathom.video/share/qwrJx6xiz-EfXuBjxy8bDu7tb7uSjD8A?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
      - [Re-evaluate the need for GrowthX to cover the \~480 competitor gap articles.](https://fathom.video/share/qwrJx6xiz-EfXuBjxy8bDu7tb7uSjD8A?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
      - [Confirm the meeting schedule (Wednesdays vs. Fridays) with Erik on Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/qwrJx6xiz-EfXuBjxy8bDu7tb7uSjD8A?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
